titleStmt.title: SII 37.236: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 236. (A.R. No. B 342 of 1940-41.) Peddapasupula, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in survey No. 1278, 2 km to the east of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1689, Virōdhi, Āśvīja ba. 10. However the cyclic year Virōdhi falls in the Śaka year 1691, so its date may correspond to 1769 A.D., October 24, Tuesday.

It records a gift of land as Sarvamanya to Phakīru-Mamadu, son of Mamadu Husēnu Chōpudār by the Reḍḍis and Karaṇams of Kosupā-Pedapasupula. The gift was made on the request of Phakīru Mamadu for the same persons and also for the merit of Lālā jamadār-Sāhebu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī jayābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1689 Agunēṭi
virōdhināma saṁvatsara Āśvija ba 10 lu .
śrīmatu mamadu huśēnu cōpudāru
gāri komāruḍu pakiru mamadugāri
ki khasupā pedapasupula reḍikaraṇālu
vrāyiṁcci yiccina bhūdāna dha
¨rma śilāśāsanaṁ . māgrāmamu
lō mānyaṁ kāvalenani Aḍigiti
riganuka Adēprakāraṁ sāhebu
lavāri sukṛtaṁgānu śibihilā
lā jamādāru sāhebulavāri
śalavuna prakāraṁ mīku pilla
pāṭi pāṭidōvanu dha . gitta ye
rrayakuṁṭa paralu prā . saṁ
vatsarālu veṁnnapūsa caṁnnu śēśina sthalaṁ Ayidumu
cēnu mīku savamānyaṁ
gānu yistimi . ganuka mī
putra pautra pāraṁparyaṁtta
raṁ Ācaṁdrā¨rka sthāyigā
nu vrāyiṁcci yēśina śilā
śāsanaṁ dīniki yavaru
Aḍamu vaccinā kāśilō
gōhatya cēśina pāpā
duru . svadattā dviguṇaṁ
ṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ .
pahārēṇa . svadattaṁ

bhōgarāju
sōmarāju
rāmacaṁdṛḍu
subayarā
ju nallapurā
jugāru vrā
yiṁcina
śilā
Digital edition of SII 37.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
